app.title: S3 to S3
app.subtitle: Transfer files and folders between AWS S3 and Oracle Cloud

browser.emptyDest: Empty folder — right-click or drop files here
browser.emptySource: No items in this folder — right-click for options

confirmTransfer.title: Confirm transfer
confirmTransfer.description: The items below will be copied from source to destination:

transfer.idle: No transfer in progress. Drag items from source to destination.

errors.createFolderSetup: Select a profile and bucket before creating a folder

profile.secretRequired: Secret Key is required for new profiles
profile.namespaceRequired: Namespace is required for Oracle Cloud
profile.secretForTest: Enter Secret Key to test a new profile
profile.decryptUnavailable: System encryption is unavailable to read saved credentials

s3.noSuchBucketOracle: Bucket "{{bucket}}" not found in namespace "{{namespace}}" (region {{region}}). Endpoint: {{endpoint}}. Check bucket name, region, compartment, and IAM permissions.
s3.noSuchBucket: Bucket "{{bucket}}" does not exist or access denied (region {{region}}).
s3.accessDenied: No permission to access "{{bucket}}". Check credentials and IAM policies.
s3.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check Access Key and Secret Key.

transfer.setupRequired: Configure source and destination before transferring
transfer.inProgress: A transfer is already in progress

errors.oracleNamespace: Namespace is required for Oracle Cloud

hints.oracleEmptyBuckets: No buckets returned by Oracle S3 API. Check namespace, region, IAM permissions and compartment. Add manual buckets in profile or type the name below.
hints.oracleManualBuckets: ListBuckets returned nothing; using manually configured buckets from profile.
